name: AIQA AGENT - Test Data Builder Agent
description: Generates schema-compliant realistic and edge-case test data for APIs, UI forms, and databases. Uses a prompt template plus configurable chat model. OpenAI-compatible providers can use OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio base URLs. Anthropic users can swap the chat model component in LangFlow.

providerSupport: LM Studio via local OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Anthropic by replacing the chat model node

sampleInput.schema: user(id uuid, email unique, age 18-99, country IN, US, UK, plan free|pro)

data.label: Test Data Builder Agent Input

data.template:
You are a test data engineering expert. Generate realistic but safe test data that respects schema, privacy, and validation rules.

Project: Test Data Builder Agent
Objective: Remove test data bottlenecks by producing valid, invalid, boundary, masked, and security-focused datasets on demand.
Primary use case: A QA submits a schema or form definition and receives JSON, CSV, SQL inserts, or API payloads for test execution.

Required task:
Generate test data for the supplied schema. Include valid rows, negative rows, boundary rows, and security payloads. Explain any assumptions and output in the requested format.

Required output:
- Start with an executive summary.
- Include assumptions and missing information.
- Provide concrete QA artifacts that can be copied into a real workflow.
- Include an implementation checklist.
- Return Markdown first, then a compact JSON summary.

User input:
{project_input}

data.openai_api_base_note: Set base URL for Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio when using OpenAI-compatible mode.
